channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How The Times Tracks Down the Connections Behind Trump’s Pardons
item.description: Reporters tapped sources, combed through public records and scrutinized social media to penetrate the web of influence and money underlying the presid...

item.title: No lawsuits required: U.S. Customs is working on a system to refund tariffs
item.description: U.S. Customs told the trade court it aims for a streamlined process in 45 days to return importers' money without requiring individual lawsuits.

item.title: Oil surges to its highest price since 2023, and stocks drop after U.S. jobs report
item.description: Stocks fell Friday on worries that the economy could become stuck in a worst-case scenario of stagnating growth and high inflation. Oil prices touched...

item.title: Middle East conflicts largely avoided energy facilities in the past. Not in this war
item.description: Recent conflicts in the region have either spared energy infrastructure or caused limited damage. That isn't the case in the U.S.-Israeli war with Ira...

item.title: Democrats Blame Trump For Jobs Report as Republicans Play Defense
item.description: The weaker-than-expected numbers quickly became a source of tension between the two parties ahead of the midterm elections.

item.title: Poll: A majority of Americans opposes U.S. military action in Iran
item.description: Most Americans disapprove of President Trump's handling of Iran, and a majority sees Iran as either only a minor threat or no threat at all, an NPR/ P...

item.title: Jesse Jackson Chicago Funeral: Obama, Biden, Clinton to Attend
item.description: The large-scale, public event in Chicago on Friday caps two weeks of memorials for Mr. Jackson, the civil rights leader, who died at 84.

item.title: Your Winter Paralympics primer: What, who and how to watch
item.description: Hundreds of para athletes are competing in Italy through March 15. Many Americans are defending past titles, with the U.S. sled hockey team hoping to ...

item.title: The A.I. Labor Crisis Is Coming. This Is the Solution.
item.description: America’s strength has always been its private sector. Empowering it can save us from A.I.’s worst effects on jobs.

item.title: Israel says it struck an underground bunker at Khamenei’s compound.
Macron speaks with Lebanon’s leader, as France seeks to broker a truce between Israel and Hezbollah.
Justice Dept. Pushes for Charges Against Cuban Leaders
item.description: The move comes as President Trump is ratcheting up his rhetorical assault on Cuba’s leadership.

item.title: New England Patriots’ Plane Ferried Americans Back From Middle East
item.description: The flight was arranged and paid for by the State Department, officials said, as part of the evacuations of citizens stranded by attacks in the Middle...

item.title: Live Updates: Oil and Gas Prices Jump as Iran War’s Economic Cost Climbs
item.description: The price of oil surged to more than $90 a barrel and U.S. gasoline prices rose again. Israeli airstrikes pummeled Tehran and Lebanon, and President T...

item.title: What to know about the jobs report.
item.description: Employers shed 92,000 jobs in February and the unemployment rate rose to 4.4 percent.
